MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-29-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANTS DC FIRST AID, INC. AND DC SAFETY SALES CO, INC. NO APPEARANCES MADE IN THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANTS DC FIRST AID, INC. AND DC SAFETY SALES CO, INC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. COUNSEL FOR MR. ENGLANDER IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER THAT REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND A PROPOSED CONSENT JUDGMENT SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: SEAN KANE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANTS DC FIRST AID, INC. AND DC SAFETY SALES CO, INC.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Peter Englander's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendants DC First Aid, Inc. and DC Safety Sales Co, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Counsel for Mr. Englander is required to prepare a proposed order that repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and a proposed consent judgment signed by all parties.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported (302/HK)
